title: Enhanced Gantt/timeline Widget Functionality

posts.author: jp_nonnet (JP)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings all,

My feature request is to make the Gantt and Timeline Widget more user friendly from a creative marketing point of view.

I am looking to have a gantt chart widget, that enables you to connect evergreen campaign assets/media files to a campaign column within the gantt or timeline widget (see attached for more context):

Gantt Thumbnail - Frame 12309×1732 163 KB

I want to be able to make the direct visual correlation between a creative asset and what campaigns that creative asset is running on and then be able to take further action like download the media file(s) (50+ MB) from the gantt chart/timeline widget, or duplicate the creative asset to another campaign from within my timeline/gantt widget.

Does anyone else working in creative marketing feel like there are limitations to the Gantt chart /Timeline and is there an appetite here in this community to see a supercharged Gantt/Timeline widget that is tailored for creative marketing use cases. I work for large enterprise with over $3Billion in annual recurring revenue and we are desperately looking for an EPIC feature like this.
